title: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Biotechnology
content: Galgotias University doctoral program in Biotechnology require students to develop research-based aptitude in diverse research areas of fundamental & applied biology like molecular microbiology, genomics, Bioinformatics, Cell biology, Plant biotechnology, Proteomics, Nanobiotechnology, Biosensors, Applied Microbiology and Biotechnology, Metabolomics etc The program emphasis is also laid on to encourage students to participate in several seminars, conferences and research in scientific laboratories, analyze the results, and publish the findings in academic journals.
